name: reliability-kit
description: Trustworthy test foundations: a language-adaptive 4-layer test rig (L0 quality · L1 unit · L2 integration · L3 E2E) optimized on BOTH axes — quality × speed. Diagnose → scaffold → guide, with a single `verify` entry that the slice baseliner adopts as measureCommand/filterCommand. (spec-first joins in 0.2.0.)
